videos.title: Power BI Tutorial for Beginners (Step-by-Step in 30 Minutes)
videos.description:
In this Guy in a Cube video, Patrick is showing a complete introduction to Power BI for beginners. This is not just a tour of features. It is a practical walkthrough of how Power BI works from start to finish.

Patrick walks through how to get data into Power BI Desktop, clean and transform it with Power Query, build a simple model, create basic DAX measures, design report visuals, and publish the final report to the Power BI service.

The big idea is simple: do not learn Power BI as a random co

videos.title: Will Fable 5 kill jobs? #fable5 #fableisback #anthropic #futureofwork
videos.description:
The only jobs this model actually kills are the ones with zero judgment, the pure-execution roles where nothing really gets decided and the work could honestly have been automated any time in the last ten years anyway.

Everything else still needs a person, because a model this capable does not run itself, and someone still has to aim it, feed it the right context, check what it produced, and own the result when it lands on someone's desk. That is not a smaller job than the one you have now, it

videos.description:
Full model routing guide:
https://natesnewsletter.substack.com/p/which-ai-model-to-use?r=1z4sm5&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=true

Every AI model suddenly looks replaceable, and picking the right one has turned into a second job. This video is a practical model picker: how to choose which AI to use for real work without overpaying or drowning in model names.

My Links 🔗
👉🏻 Newsletter: https://natesnewsletter.substack.com/
👉🏻 X: https://x.com/natebjones
👉🏻 TikTo

videos.title: The fastest way to make an AI agent dangerous #AIagents #AI #agents #automation #futureofwork
videos.description:
The fastest way to make an AI agent dangerous is simple. Let everyone use it and nobody own it.

That is where it breaks. Not some rogue AI. An agent that can read your files, draft messages, change code, and update records, with nobody whose actual job is to check it. The output looks clean, so people stop asking where it came from.

Ownership is the missing skill. 

I put the one-page owner card and the two prompts that fix this on Substack.

Full breakdown: https://natesnewsletter.substack.co

This is how to build a personal agent that starts from your context, follows your intent, and waits for your yes before it acts.

videos.title: Fable Is Back: Here's What You Should Try First
videos.description:
OpenAI and other labs are racing to slash inference costs, prompting debate about token-efficiency techniques and quality trade-offs. Anthropic regained global access to Fable 5 after export controls were lifted, triggering discussions about jailbreaking, tightened guardrails, and regulatory opacity. New model launches and platform moves include Sonnet 5's agentic-but-costly approach, Base44's fine-tuned Base1, and AWS's billion-dollar FTE push for enterprise AI.

The AI Daily Brief helps you un

videos.title: Fable 5 Is Back But With Some BIG Restrictions
videos.description:
Fable 5 is back for all paid Claude users, but it comes with tighter usage limits and stronger safeguards than before. Here's everything that changed, what actually gets blocked in real-world use, and how to get the most out of Fable 5 before the July 7th deadline.

0:00 Intro
0:22 Fable 5 Is Back
0:38 New Usage Limits
1:39 Increased Safeguards
3:13 A Bad Precedent
3:31 What Actually Gets Blocked
5:22 How I'll Use Fable 5

Power Automate.feature_name: Configure notifications for desktop flow checker in admin portal
Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: As an administrator, you need a clear way to track quality issues across the desktop flows in your environment. But today you only discover problems when they cause run failures or support escalations. With configurable notifications in the admin portal, you choose which rule violations trigger alerts and what parameters apply to each notification type. You stay ahead of quality risks, enforce governance standards across makers, and reduce the time you spend reacting to issues across environment

Power Automate.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Power Automate.description: When you can’t quickly see what changed between flow versions, you lose time fixing problems and risk pushing the wrong updates to production. Side-by-side version comparison gives you a clear view of what was added, removed, or updated so you can make confident decisions. You resolve issues faster, avoid costly mistakes, and work better with co-owners by reviewing changes before publishing.

Microsoft Dataverse.description: A remote Microsoft Dataverse model context protocol (MCP) server represents the next evolution in how AI systems and enterprise data interact within the Microsoft ecosystem. Unlike local MCP setups, which require developers or users to install SDKs, configure proxies, and manage environment access manually, a remote Dataverse MCP server runs as a centrally hosted, managed service. This shift streamlines integration, improves security, and enables scalable AI connectivity across teams, devices, a

Microsoft Dataverse.feature_name: Create Dataverse agent users with Microsoft Entra agent identity
Microsoft Dataverse.enabled_for: Admins, makers, marketers, or analysts, automatically
Microsoft Dataverse.description: This feature enables secure, compliant management of AI agents in Microsoft Dataverse, which reduces risk and improves governance for autonomous and interactive agents.

Microsoft Power Platform governance and.feature_name: Prevent sending sensitive data to Purview audit logs
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.product: Microsoft Power Platform governance and administration
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.enabled_for: Users by admins, makers, or analysts
Microsoft Power Platform governance and.description: This feature restricts customer business data in Dataverse audit logs from being sent to Purview auditing streams. This helps ensure compliance and reduces the risk of leaking sensitive customer data.
